Rules.InvariantScript:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Notes", Icon: Icon.Note, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People}
)
If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(280, Self.Width - 60), Min(280, Self.Height - 60))

Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
With(
    {
        varRecordWindowMeasurement: If(
            ThisItem.Category="Window Measurement",
            LookUp(
                colCdsWindowMeasurements,
                'Window Measurement'=ThisItem.ID
            ),
            Blank()
        )
    },
    If(
        !IsBlank(varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number'),
        "Mull " & varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number'
    )
    &
    If(
        !IsBlank(varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number')
        And !IsBlank(varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Exterior Result'),
        ", "
    )
    &
    If(
        varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Exterior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.Yes
        Or varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Interior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.Yes,
        "Contains Lead",
        varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Exterior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.No
        Or varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Interior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.No,
        "No Lead",
        Blank()
    )
)

ThisItem.Image
/*
LookUp(
    colCdsWindowStyles,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        colCdsWindowChoices[@'Window Choice'] = ThisItem.'Window Choice'.'Window Choice',
        Style
    ).'Window Style' = colCdsWindowStyles[@'Window Style']
).Thumbnail.Value
*/

And(
    ThisItem.Category="Window Measurement",
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        'Window Measurement'=ThisItem.ID,
        Completed
    ) = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Completed.Yes
)

And(
    ThisItem.Category="Window Measurement",
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        'Window Measurement'=ThisItem.ID,
        Completed
    ) = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Completed.Yes
)

If(
    !IsBlank(
        LookUp(
            colCdsWindowMeasurements,
            'Window Measurement' = gblRecordWindowMeasurement_Tech.'Window Measurement',
            Notes
        )
    ),
    gblAppStyles.Status.Info,
    gblAppStyles.Status.Neutral
)

Filter(
    colCdsWindowMeasurements,
    Job.Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
    !IsBlank('Lead Test: Exterior Component') Or !IsBlank('Lead Test: Interior Component')
)

IsEmpty(
    Filter(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        Job.Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
        !IsBlank('Lead Test: Exterior Component') Or !IsBlank('Lead Test: Interior Component')
    )
)

"No lead tests have been added to this job
"

IsEmpty(
    Filter(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        Job.Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
        !IsBlank('Lead Test: Exterior Component') Or !IsBlank('Lead Test: Interior Component')
    )
)

LookUp(
    colCdsWindowStyles,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        colCdsWindowChoices[@'Window Choice'] = gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Window Choice'.'Window Choice',
        Style
    ).'Window Style' = colCdsWindowStyles[@'Window Style'],
    Name
) & ", " & LookUp(
    colCdsWindowModels,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        colCdsWindowChoices[@'Window Choice'] = gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Window Choice'.'Window Choice',
        Model
    ).'Window Model' = colCdsWindowModels[@'Window Model'],
    Name
) & ", " & LookUp(
    colCdsAccounts,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        colCdsWindowChoices[@'Window Choice'] = gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Window Choice'.'Window Choice',
        Manufacturer
    ).Account = colCdsAccounts[@Account],
    'Account Name'
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
If(
    locComponentExteriorInterior = "Exterior",
    Filter(
        colCdsDataEntryChoices,
        Type = gblOptionSets.Global.DataEntryType.ExteriorWindowComponent
    ),
    Filter(
        colCdsDataEntryChoices,
        Type = gblOptionSets.Global.DataEntryType.InteriorWindowComponent
    )
)

Rules.InvariantScript: IsBlank(gblRecordUserCurrent.'Lead Test: Certificate ID') Or gblRecordUserCurrent.'Lead Test: Certificate Expiry Date' < Today()

If(
    IsBlank(gblRecordUserCurrent.'Lead Test: Certificate ID'),
    "You do not have the required certificate",
    gblRecordUserCurrent.'Lead Test: Certificate Expiry Date' < Today(),
    "Your lead test certiciate is expired",
    Blank()
)
